description: Repository-wide tooling for the easy-claude framework
name: easy-claude-tooling

scripts.codex:sync: npm run codex:migrate && npm run codex:sync:hooks && npm run codex:sync:context && npm run codex:verify:all
scripts.codex:sync:copy-skills: node .claude/scripts/codex/migrate-claude-to-codex.mjs --copy-skills && npm run codex:sync:hooks && npm run codex:sync:context && npm run codex:verify:all
scripts.codex:verify:all: npm run codex:test:tooling && npm run codex:verify:workflow-cycle && npm run codex:verify:skill-protocol && npm run codex:verify:no-project-residue
